review_questions.question: Is RX.3b correctly limited to A77 and A78?
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, keep the scope limited to the TO-TK graph lane.

review_questions.question: Is the A77 draft spec acceptable with needs A63 and A29?
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, preserve A63/A29 unless HCS wants a separate lighter break-even concept unit first.

review_questions.question: Is the A78 draft spec acceptable with needs A63 and A75?
review_questions.recommended_answer: B. Mostly; decide explicitly whether A78 should add A77 after A77 is minted.

review_questions.question: Should A77 and A78 procedures satisfy the PV graph-stage constraints without creating real PV templates yet?
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, record PV requirements now but keep real PV templates for PV.3/PV.5.

review_questions.question: Should A80, A81, and HOLD_GRAPHICAL_MO_MK_OPTIMUM remain held?
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, keep them held until PV producer-graph templates or separate design review.

review_questions.question: Should A77 and A78 remain generator-blocked and non-interactive if later mutated?
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, hard block student-facing use.

review_questions.question: If the gate passes, authorize later CLI-only unit mutation for A77 and A78?
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, after live numbering/dependency checks, if HCS accepts the specs and dependency decision.

review_questions.question: What gate status should GATE-RX3b-producer-graph-lane-review receive?

required_conditions_if_passes: Run live numbering check immediately before any later mutation.
Use only unit-add.js, in the order A77, A78.
Record the A78 dependency decision in the gate closure and mutation log.
Do not mutate A80, A81, HOLD_GRAPHICAL_MO_MK_OPTIMUM, or held duplicate/overlap records.
Mark A77 and A78 generator-blocked and non-interactive until generators exist and validate.
Do not hand-edit references/machine, references/external, authored source files, or RAG chunks.
Do not authorize diagnostics, adaptive routing, student-facing AI, automatic sequencing, mastery decisions, summative use, or student-facing PV projection.
